title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CANUMAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANUMAY, CITY OF VALENZUELA TO CANUMAY WEST NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 6220; 109 OG No. 25, 4401 (June 24, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10439, April 08, 2013 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF CANUMAY NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL IN BARANGAY CANUMAY, CITY OF VALENZUELA TO CANUMAY WEST NATIONAL HIGH SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1.

Renaming of a National High School.

â The name of Canumay National High School in Barangay Canumay, City of Valenzuela is hereby changed to Canumay West National High School.

SEC. 2.

Location of the Main Campus.

â The main campus of the Canumay West National High School shall continue to remain in its present location in Barangay Canumay, City of Valenzuela.

SEC. 3.

Effectivity.

â This Act shall take effect fifteen (15) days after its publication in the

Official Gazette.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on June 4, 2012 and January 28, 2013, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EMMA LIRIO-REYES

Secretary of the Senate

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: APR 0 8 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
